name: Boom & Zoom
author: Abstract Games factory (game by Ty Bomba, 2012; 2nd ed. Hollandspiele 2018)
description: Ty Bomba's abstract wargame (2012; definitive Hollandspiele 2nd edition 2018). Four 3-high laser-tower stacks per side on an 8x8 board: each turn one stack either ZOOMS (moves in a straight line, up to its height) or BOOMS (shoots one counter off an enemy stack it could reach). Bear stacks off beyond the enemy home row -- one point per counter, with diagonal escape through the corners. When one side has nothing left on the board, the higher score wins; equal scores draw. Shoot to cripple, not to kill: every counter you remove is a point your opponent can no longer score, but a dead stack no longer slows them down.
